Roblox ਕੀ ਹੈ? ROBLOX ਇੱਕ ਔਨਲਾਈਨ ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਖੇਡ ਦਾ ਮੈਦਾਨ ਅਤੇ ਵਰਕਸ਼ਾਪ ਹੈ, ਜਿੱਥੇ ਹਰ ਉਮਰ ਦੇ ਬੱਚੇ ਸੁਰੱਖਿਅਤ ਢੰਗ ਨਾਲ ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ, ਬਣਾ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ, ਮੌਜ-ਮਸਤੀ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ ਅਤੇ ਸਿੱਖ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ। ਇਹ ਇਸ ਪੱਖੋਂ ਵਿਲੱਖਣ ਹੈ ਕਿ ROBLOX 'ਤੇ ਲਗਭਗ ਹਰ ਚੀਜ਼ ਭਾਈਚਾਰੇ ਦੇ ਮੈਂਬਰਾਂ ਦੁਆਰਾ ਡਿਜ਼ਾਈਨ ਅਤੇ ਬਣਾਈ ਗਈ ਹੈ। ROBLOX 13 ਤੋਂ 18 ਸਾਲ ਦੀ ਉਮਰ ਦੇ ਬੱਚਿਆਂ ਲਈ ਤਿਆਰ ਕੀਤਾ ਗਿਆ ਹੈ, ਪਰ ਇਹ ਹਰ ਉਮਰ ਦੇ ਲੋਕਾਂ ਲਈ ਖੁੱਲ੍ਹਾ ਹੈ। ਹਰੇਕ ਖਿਡਾਰੀ ਇੱਕ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਚੁਣ ਕੇ ਅਤੇ ਇਸਨੂੰ ਇੱਕ ਪਛਾਣ ਦੇ ਕੇ ਸ਼ੁਰੂਆਤ ਕਰਦਾ ਹੈ। ਉਹ ਫਿਰ ROBLOX ਦੀ ਪੜਚੋਲ ਕਰ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ — ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰਕੇ, ਗੇਮਾਂ ਖੇਡ ਕੇ, ਜਾਂ ਰਚਨਾਤਮਕ ਪ੍ਰੋਜੈਕਟਾਂ 'ਤੇ ਸਹਿਯੋਗ ਕਰਕੇ ਦੂਜਿਆਂ ਨਾਲ ਗੱਲਬਾਤ ਕਰਦੇ ਹੋਏ। ਹਰੇਕ ਖਿਡਾਰੀ ਨੂੰ ਇੱਕ ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਟੂਲਬਾਕਸ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਆਪਣੀ ਅਣਵਿਕਸਿਤ ਰੀਅਲ ਅਸਟੇਟ ਦਾ ਇੱਕ ਟੁਕੜਾ ਵੀ ਦਿੱਤਾ ਜਾਂਦਾ ਹੈ ਜਿਸ ਨਾਲ ਉਹ ਕੁਝ ਵੀ ਡਿਜ਼ਾਈਨ ਅਤੇ ਬਣਾ ਸਕਦਾ ਹੈ — ਭਾਵੇਂ ਇਹ ਇੱਕ ਨੇਵੀਗੇਬਲ ਸਕਾਈਸਕ੍ਰੈਪਰ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਕੰਮ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲਾ ਹੈਲੀਕਾਪਟਰ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਵਿਸ਼ਾਲ ਪਿੰਨਬਾਲ ਮਸ਼ੀਨ ਹੋਵੇ, ਇੱਕ ਮਲਟੀਪਲੇਅਰ "ਕੈਪਚਰ ਦ ਫਲੈਗ" ਗੇਮ ਹੋਵੇ ਜਾਂ ਕੋਈ ਹੋਰ, ਅਜੇ ਤੱਕ ਸੁਪਨੇ ਵਿੱਚ ਨਹੀਂ ਆਈ ਰਚਨਾ। ਵਰਚੁਅਲ ਜ਼ਮੀਨ ਦੇ ਇਸ ਪਹਿਲੇ ਪਲਾਟ ਲਈ ਕੋਈ ਕੀਮਤ ਨਹੀਂ ਹੈ। ਹਿੱਸਾ ਲੈ ਕੇ ਅਤੇ ਵਧੀਆ ਚੀਜ਼ਾਂ ਬਣਾ ਕੇ, ROBLOX ਮੈਂਬਰ ROBLOX ਡਾਲਰਾਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਵਿਸ਼ੇਸ਼ ਬੈਜ ("Robux") ਵੀ ਕਮਾ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ। ਬਦਲੇ ਵਿੱਚ, ਉਹ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਕੱਪੜੇ ਅਤੇ ਸਹਾਇਕ ਉਪਕਰਣਾਂ ਦੇ ਨਾਲ-ਨਾਲ ਪ੍ਰੀਮੀਅਮ ਬਿਲਡਿੰਗ ਸਮੱਗਰੀ, ਇੰਟਰਐਕਟਿਵ ਹਿੱਸੇ ਅਤੇ ਕੰਮ ਕਰਨ ਵਾਲੇ ਵਿਧੀਆਂ ਖਰੀਦਣ ਲਈ ਔਨਲਾਈਨ ਕੈਟਾਲਾਗ ਖਰੀਦ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਨ।

#Roblox #foltyn

Cos'è Roblox? Roblox è un parco giochi e laboratorio virtuale online, dove i ragazzi di tutte le età possono interagire, creare, divertirsi e imparare in tutta sicurezza. La sua particolarità è che praticamente tutto su ROBLOX è progettato e costruito dai membri della community. ROBLOX è pensato per ragazzi dai 13 ai 18 anni, ma è aperto a persone di tutte le età. Ogni giocatore inizia scegliendo un avatar e dandogli un'identità. Può quindi esplorare ROBLOX, interagendo con gli altri tramite chat, giocando o collaborando a progetti creativi. Ogni giocatore riceve anche un proprio appezzamento di terreno virtuale non edificato, insieme a una cassetta degli attrezzi virtuale con cui progettare e costruire qualsiasi cosa: un grattacielo navigabile, un elicottero funzionante, un flipper gigante, un gioco multiplayer "Cattura la bandiera" o qualsiasi altra creazione ancora da immaginare. Questo primo appezzamento di terreno virtuale è gratuito. Partecipando e costruendo cose interessanti, i membri di ROBLOX possono guadagnare badge speciali e dollari ROBLOX ("Robux"). A loro volta, possono utilizzare questi Robux per acquistare abbigliamento e accessori per il proprio avatar, nonché materiali da costruzione di alta qualità, componenti interattivi e meccanismi funzionanti dal catalogo online.

¿Qué es Roblox? Roblox es un mundo virtual y plataforma de creación en línea donde niños y niñas de todas las edades pueden interactuar, crear, divertirse y aprender de forma segura. Es único porque prácticamente todo en ROBLOX está diseñado y construido por los miembros de la comunidad. ROBLOX está diseñado para jóvenes de 13 a 18 años, pero está abierto a personas de todas las edades. Cada jugador comienza eligiendo un avatar y dándole una identidad. Luego, puede explorar ROBLOX, interactuando con otros mediante el chat, jugando o colaborando en proyectos creativos. Cada jugador también recibe su propio terreno virtual sin desarrollar, junto con un conjunto de herramientas virtuales para diseñar y construir cualquier cosa: desde un rascacielos navegable o un helicóptero funcional, hasta una máquina de pinball gigante, un juego multijugador de "Captura la Bandera" o cualquier otra creación imaginable. Este primer terreno virtual es gratuito. Al participar y construir cosas increíbles, los miembros de ROBLOX pueden ganar insignias especiales y dólares ROBLOX ("Robux"). Con estos, pueden comprar ropa y accesorios para sus avatares en el catálogo en línea, así como materiales de construcción premium, componentes interactivos y mecanismos funcionales.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Phool Main Bhejoon - Salma Pe Dil Aagaya | Ayub Khan, Saadhika | Kumar Sanu Lata Mangeshkar 90s Hits
snippet.description:
Presenting the melodious song “Phool Main Bhejoon” from Salma Pe Dil Aagaya. Featuring Ayub Khan and Saadhika, this heartfelt romantic track sung by Kumar Sanu and Lata Mangeshkar remains a favorite among lovers of 90s Bollywood music.

Phool Main Bhejoon - Salma Pe Dil Aagaya | Ayub Khan, Saadhika | Kumar Sanu Lata Mangeshkar 90s Hits

Song : Phool Main Bhejoon
Movie: Salma Pe Dil Aagaya (1997)
Star Cast : Ayub Khan, Saadhika.
Singers: Lata Mangeshkar, Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Aadesh Shrivastava
Lyricist: Saawan Kumar

#latamangeshkar #kumarsanu #ayubkhan #saadhika #hindigane #hindisong #hindilovesongs #hindiromanticsong #lovesong #bollywoodsongs #bollywoodlovesongs #bollywoodhindisong #lovesong #romanticsong #romantichindisongs #90shindisongs #90severgreen #90ssong #90s #evergreenhits #evergreensong #kumarsanusongs #latamangeshkarsongs  #sadhikasongs #ayubkhansongs 

Song Lyrics :
Phul mai bheju ha phul mai bheju
dil ye karta hai par tera pata malum nahi
malum nahi ha malum nahi khat mai likhu
ha khat mai likhu dil ye karta hai
par tera pata malum nahi
malum nahi ha malum nahi

chori chori najar milake haye wo tera sharmana
chori chori najar milake haye wo tera sharmana
aachal ko dabake danto me nayi ada se muskana
chum lu tujhko ha chum lu tujhko dil ye karta hai
par tera pata malum nahi malum nahi ha malum nahi

tere seher se meri gali se baade shaba to gujarti hai
tere seher se meri gali se baade shaba to gujarti hai
daman se hawa pe likh dena jo tere dil pe gujarti hai
udke aau haa udke aau dil ye karta hai
par tera pata malum nahi malum nahi ha malum nahi

range hina me teri surat aaye najar mehbub
rab ke likhe ko sach kar dala pyar ne tere khoob
haye rabba bichda yar milade yar bina mai mar jana
o rabba bichda yar milade yar bina mai mar jana
shama ke sang jal jane ko tadap raha hai parwana
kurba ho jau ha kurba ho jau dil ye karta hai
par tera pata malum nahi malum nahi ha malum nahi
phul mai bheju ha khat mai likhu dil ye karta hai
par tera pata malum nahi malum nahi ha malum nahi
malum nahi ha malum nahi

snippet.title: Old Tamil Songs in Color | Digitally Restored | 4K Music | Special Video Jukebox 1 #4krestoration
snippet.description:
Welcome to the 4K Cinemas Classic channel's ultimate nostalgia trip. We have brought your favorite classic Tamil hits back to life. Watch as history meets modern technology in this exclusive Special Video JukeBox, featuring legendary actors and timeless melodies completely transformed for the modern screen.

Features of This Jukebox Special:

- Old Tamil Songs in Color: Black-and-white classics have been meticulously colorized to bring out vibrant, lifelike details.
- Digitally Restored: Audio and video static, scratches, and noise have been professionally cleaned up for a seamless viewing experience.
- 4K Ultra HD Music: Upscaled to crisp 4K resolution so you can enjoy the golden era on your big screens with crystal-clear quality.

Tracklist & Timestamps:

00:00 Kannum Kannum Kalanthu — Vanji Kottai Valipan | P. Leela, Jikki | Kothamangalam Subbu | C. Ramachandra, R.Vaidyanathan
08:12 Aasai Konda Nenju Rendu - Irumbu Thirai | P. Leela | Pattukkottai Kalyanasundaram | S. V. Venkatraman
12:32 Aayiram Penmai Malaratume - Vaazhkai Padagu | P. Susheela | Kannadasan | M. S. Viswanathan, T. K. Ramamoorthy

If you loved this restoration, please give this video a Like, Share it with fellow music lovers, and Subscribe to our channel for more digitally restored classics!

snippet.title: ಬೆಳಗಾಯಿತು ಏಳು ಓ ಮುದ್ದು ಬೆನಕ | BELAGAYITHU YELU | Wednesday Vinayaka Devotional Songs | Ganesha Songs
snippet.description:
ಬೆಳಗಾಯಿತು ಏಳು ಓ ಮುದ್ದು ಬೆನಕ | BELAGAYITHU YELU | Wednesday Vinayaka Devotional Songs | Ganesha Songs 

#BelagayithuYelu #GaneshaSongs #VinayakaDevotionalSongs
#WednesdaySpecial  #KannadaDevotionalSongs #GanapathiSongs 

Start your Wednesday morning with the divine blessings of Lord Ganesha through the beautiful Kannada devotional song “Belagayithu Yelu O Muddu Benaka.” This peaceful Vinayaka devotional song brings positive energy, devotion, and a spiritual feeling to your day.

Listen to this melodious Ganesha song and seek the blessings of Lord Vinayaka, Ganapathi, and Muddu Benaka for happiness, success, wisdom, and removal of obstacles. This devotional track is perfect for Wednesday special pooja, morning prayers, Vinayaka Chavithi devotion, Kannada bhakti songs, and daily Ganesha worship.

Enjoy and share this Belagayithu Yelu Kannada Ganesha devotional song with your family and friends.

🙏 Lord Ganesha Blessings For All 🙏
Like, Share & Subscribe for more devotional songs.

snippet.title: Kanda Sashti Kavasam In Tamil 🙏 | Murugan Bhakti Padalgal | Arupadai Veedu Murugan Special Songs
snippet.description:
🙏 **Kanda Sashti Kavasam In Tamil | Murugan Bhakti Padalgal | Arupadai Veedu Murugan Special Songs** 🙏

00:00 Kanda Sashti Kavasam


Experience the divine grace of Lord Murugan with this powerful collection featuring **Kanda Sashti Kavasam**, one of the most sacred Tamil devotional hymns dedicated to Murugan. Listen to these soul-stirring Murugan Bhakti Padalgal and seek the blessings of Arupadai Veedu Murugan for protection, courage, success, and spiritual upliftment.

This devotional collection includes sacred Murugan songs glorifying the six holy abodes (Arupadai Veedu) of Lord Murugan – Tiruchendur, Palani, Swamimalai, Thirupparankundram, Pazhamudircholai, and Thiruthani. May Murugan's divine Vel remove obstacles and fill your life with peace, prosperity, and happiness.

🔔 Listen daily for divine blessings and positive energy.
🙏 Om Saravanabhava! Vetri Vel Muruganukku Arohara!

#KandaSashtiKavasam #MuruganSongs #TamilBhaktiSongs #ArupadaiVeeduMurugan

kanda sashti kavasam, murugan songs tamil, murugan bhakti padalgal, arupadai veedu murugan, palani murugan songs, tiruchendur murugan, vetri vel murugan, murugan devotional songs, tamil devotional songs, lord murugan songs, skanda sashti, subramanya swamy songs, murugan kavacham, murugan jukebox, saravanabhava songs, thiruthani murugan, pazhamudircholai murugan
